meaning: n.管理人,行政官 (Administrator)[计]网络管理员
examples: He is well-intentioned but a poor administrator.
He's a local government administrator, that is to say a civil servant.
Our administrator is a paragon of neatness, efficiency, and reliability.
Days after the sale, on Dec. 31, 2001, a Merrill administrator asked Faneuil about the ImClone sales.
Typically your employer or your pension plan administrator can project what you may receive at different retirement dates.
